Protein families: Class I-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily, Cation-independent O-methyltransferase family
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the class I-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily. Cation-independent O-methyltransferase family. {ECO:0000255|PROSITE-ProRule:PRU01020}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=myo-inositol + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 1D-4-O-methyl-myo-inositol + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:23248, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:17268, ChEBI:CHEBI:18266, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789; EC=2.1.1.129;
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Catalyzes the methylation of myo-inositol into ononitol (1D-4-O-methyl myo-inositol), the first step in the biosynthesis of the cyclic sugar pinitol which has osmoprotective properties.
